chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Ex. Application No. 47 of 2015 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of CMA No.305/2019 13.01.2026 Mr. Waqar Ahmed, advocate for DH Mr. AQ Abbasi, advocate for JD ---------- Counsel for Decree Holder files application under Order 21 rule 2 CPC duly signed by authorized attorney of DH. Counsel for JD has no objection to grant of said application. Accordingly, same is allowed in terms thereof and the matter is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E Ashraf
